text.title: Take-Home Rubric Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether take-home-rubric-template applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this an engineering take-home stage with ≥2 independent reviewers?

branch.conclusion: Run calibration session before live use.
Keep existing rubric; do not duplicate.

example.description: When `yes AND no_existing_rubric` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
